titleStmt.title: SII 39.216: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 216. (A.R. No. 216 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARAGHAVAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-IN THE SAME PLACE KṚISHṆADĒVA MAHĀRĀYA, VISHA (1521-22 A.D.)

summary.p: Incomplete. This inscription refers to a certian person named Vasavappa Nāyaka, the elder brother of Aḍappattu Vaiyappa Nāyaka, who made a gift of the tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam village Vānavantāṅgal for a festival to be celebrated on the day of Jyēshṭhā in the month of Māśi which was the natal star of the king Krishnadēva Mahārāyar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu viṣa varuṣam Āṭi mātam 3 10 1§-śrī mat yirāyar kiṣṇadevamahāirāyar Aṭappattu vayyappa nāyakkar tamaiyanār vacavappa nāyakkar tāmalkoṭṭam tāmal nāṭṭu tiruppati tiruppu
taṉmacātaṉam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi Ivvemperumāṉukku tiruviṭaiāṭṭamāka naṭantu vanta tāmal piṭākaiyāṉa vāṉavantāṅkal tiṟantu paṇṭāravāṭaiyāka naṭantu varukaiyil nā
koḷḷukaiyil tāmal piṭākaiyāṉa vāṉavaṉtāṅkal nām Iṟṟai nāḷ coma vāramum yekateciyum miṟukacīriṣamum peṟṟa tivacattile Irāyar kiṣṇadevamahāirāyar taṉmamākavum Aṭappa
mācit tirunāḷ Irāyar kiṣṇadevamahāirāyar ceṉma nakṣatra keṭṭaiyi tirukkoṭi Ēṟittirunāḷ naṭatta nammiṭa Upayamāka Intavāṉavantāṅkal nañcai puñcai nāṟpāṟ kellaiyummā
Ettala meṇṇum vicaiyarākuvaṟku paṭuvayil Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.216 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
